ogTitle: Mansfield vs Mantuan Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mansfield and Mantuan Downs.
heading: Mansfield vs Mantuan Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mansfield, Queensland and Mantuan Downs, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mantuan Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Mansfield (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mansfield or Mantuan Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mansfield has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Mantuan Downs scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mansfield scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Mantuan Downs scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mansfield or Mantuan Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mantuan Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
